ab: uri kacuin mun a ma gadu ni sinsi tucu a qadaw.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去山上。
en: I will take you to the mountains today.

ab: qivu ti kina liyaw aravac a cacarag i gadu aya.
ch: B:媽媽說山上有很多蚊子。
en: Mom says that there are lots of mosquitoes in the mountains.

ab: tucu a qadaw uri kacin mun ni sinsi a ma vavua.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去田裡。
en: I will take you to the fields.

ab: uri vaik a men a qemusul ta qipu?
en: Are we going to loosen the soil?

ab: uri semainu itjen tucu a qadaw?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: uri kacuin a men ni sinsi a sema pana.
en: Teacher will take us to the riverside.

ab: uri semainu itjen tucu qadaw?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: uri kacuin a men a sinsi a sema gade.
en: Teacher will take us to the mountains today.

ab: uri vaik itjen a sema pana tucu qadaw?
en: Are we going to the riverside today?

ab: ini, uri kacuin itjen ni sinsi a sema gade.
ch: B:不是，老師要帶我們去山上。
en: No, our teacher is going to take us to the mountains.

ab: uri vaik itjen a sema gadu tucu qadaw?
en: Are we going to the mountains today?

ab: ini, uri vaik itjen a sema vavua tucu a qadaw.
ch: B:不是，我們今天要去田裡。
en: No, we are going to the fields.

ab: sinsi, anema tja pacunan nu semapana itjen?
ch: A:老師，我們到河邊要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see at the riverside?

ab: viak itjen a pacun ta qaqudruy.
en: We are going to see dragonflies.

ab: sinsi, uri sema gade tjen a pacun ta anema?
ch: A:老師，我們到山上要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see in the mountains?

ab: vaiki a pacun ta kalidrungudrungulj.
en: We are going to see butterflies.

ab: anema tja kudain a semavavua?
en: What are we going to do in the fields?

ab: uri vaik amen a sema vavua pacun ta nia talem a punug, kipapaulingavu izua sasiq tjainan yu!
ch: B:我們要到田裡看我們種的玉米，要小心有螞蟻、蜜蜂唷!
en: We are going to see the corn we grow in the fields, but you need to be aware of the ants and bees.

ab: sinis, uri sema pana tjen a ljemangui?
ch: A:老師我們要到河邊游泳嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to swim in the river?

ab: ini, uri vaik itjen a pacun ta qaqudruy.
en: No, we are going to see dragonflies.

ab: sinis, uri mavavua tjen a temalem ta ljaceng?
ch: A:老師我們要到田裡種菜嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to grow some vegetables in the fields?

ab: uri vaik itjen tucu qadaw a temuvud ta qipu.
en: We are going to loosen the soil today.

ab: inuan a qaqudrui a minlayalayap a pacacikecekel.
en: There are dragonflies flying around.

ab: tucu a qadaw tjupacun aken ta paqulid a valjualjut a qaqudrui.
ch: B:我今天才看過真正活著的蜻蜓。
en: Today is the first time I see real living dragonflies.

ab: izua kalidrungudrungulj izua a minlayalayap.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: yei! wa! tjengelay aken ta kalidrungudrungulj, bulay aravac.
ch: B:耶! 哇! 我喜歡蝴蝶，很漂亮。
en: Yeh! Wow! I love butterflies. They are very beautiful.

ab: izua kalidrungudrungulj izua a minlayalayap.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: inika kalidrungudrungulj a zua, tjainan azua.
en: Those are not butterflies. They are bees.

ab: imazau a pacun, nakuya macadja a ravac yu!
ch: A:在這裡看一看，不要到太遠的地方唷!
en: Come here and take a look. Don’t go too far!

ab: nanguaq, inika cemadja a uri nia sazuain.
ch: B:好，我們不會去太遠的地方。
en: Got it, we won’t go anywhere too far.

ab: maya mekelj galju a djemavac mavan nu setjakerus anga.
ch: A:不要用跑的，慢慢走免得跌倒了。
en: Don’t run and walk slowly lest you fall down.

ab: saljinga ken a pacun a kirimu.
en: I want to see them right away.
